tasks.title: Develop AI-powered Todo App MVP
tasks.description: Develop an MVP for an AI-powered todo app that includes basic todo management and AI-driven prioritization/categorization.
acceptanceCriteria: User can create, read, update, and delete todo items.
AI capability to suggest task prioritization or categorization.

tasks.title: Develop AI-powered Todo App MVP
tasks.description: Develop the MVP of the AI-powered todo app. Focus on core CRUD operations first, then integrate AI features for prioritization/categorization. Ensure a functional UI exists.
acceptanceCriteria: User can create, read, update, and delete todo items.
AI capability to suggest task prioritization or categorization.
